message.content:
@startuml
title PD parse detail

participant "Chi" as Chi
participant "pipeline" as pipeline
participant "pdlibwrapper\ncamxpdlibwrapper.cpp" as pdlibwrapper
participant "pdlibinterface\ncamxpdlibinterface.cpp" as pdlibinterface
participant "camxsensornode.cpp" as camxsensornode
participant "camxpdliblibraryhandler.cpp" as camxpdliblibraryhandler

activate Chi
activate pipeline
activate pdlibwrapper
activate pdlibinterface
activate camxsensornode
activate camxpdliblibraryhandler

note right of Chi
  ChiPDEntry[]  = "ChiPDLibraryEntry"
  ChiASDEntry[]  = "ChiASDAlgorithmEntry"
  ChiAFDEntry[]  = "ChiAFDAlgorithmEntry"
  ChiAWBEntry[]  = "ChiAWBAlgorithmEntry"
  ChiAFEntry[]   = "ChiAFAlgorithmEntry"
  from this text, can get Algorithm Entry
end note

note right of pipeline
  chi stats algo
end note

note right of pdlibwrapper
  PD lib create
end note

note right of Chi
  ProbeChiComponents
  GetAECAlgorithmCallback
  GetAFDAlgorithmCallback
  GetAFAlgorithmCallback
  GetAWBAlgorithmCallback
  GetASDAlgorithmCallback
  GetPDLibraryCallback
  GetHVXAlgorithmCallback
  return
end note

note right of pipeline
  These Callback used in camxpipeline.cpp when call pipeline:CreateNodes
end note

note right of pdlibwrapper
  for m_pStatscallback.pPDCallback
  contain these interface
  pCallbacks->pfnGetCapabilities  = PDWrapperGetCapabilities;
  pCallbacks->pfnCreate           = CreatePDLibWrapper;
  pCallbacks->pfnQueryVendorTag   = NULL;
  pCallbacks->pfnSetAlgoInterface = PDWrapperSetNodeInterface;
end note

note right of pdlibinterface
  "%s%s%s.%s"
  "VendorLibPath"
  "PathSeparator"
  "pLibName"
  "SharedLibraryExtension"
end note

note right of camxsensornode
  in dir:
  1. camx-lib-3a/system/statsalgo/pdlib
  2. camx-lib/system/statsalgo/pdlibsony
  both have camxpdlibinterface.cpp
end note

note right of camxpdliblibraryhandler
  for pipeline create, will create every node and pdlib is init in sensor node
end note

note right of camxpdliblibraryhandler
  1. ReadEEPROMData
  2. GetCSInfo
  3. GetOTPData
  4. PopulatePDAFInformation
  5. PublishPDAFInformation
  why we need publish this info?
  actually for PropertyIDSensorPDAFInfo, in IFE PDPCCv1.1 and BPS PDPCC2.0 will use it.
  since type 3 sensor will not do pdpc
end note

note right of Chi
  ProcessingNodeFinalizeInitialization
  LoadPDLibrary
  CPDLibHandler::CreateLib
end note

note right of pipeline
  call PD lib
end note

note right of pdlibwrapper
  Init PDLib
end note

note right of Chi
  for pipeline create, will create every node and pdlib is init in sensor node
end note

note right of camxpdliblibraryhandler
  1. ReadEEPROMData
  2. GetCSInfo
  3. GetOTPData
  4. PopulatePDAFInformation
  5. PublishPDAFInformation
  why we need publish this info?
  actually for PropertyIDSensorPDAFInfo, in IFE PDPCCv1.1 and BPS PDPCC2.0 will use it.
  since type 3 sensor will not do pdpc
end note

end note

end note

note right of Chi
  for pipeline create, will create every node and pdlib is init in sensor node
end note
